---
title: 'Date Tracking'
date: '2020-07-01T10:33:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2024623768878560637'
blogger_filename: '/2020/07/date-tracking.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Dating Experiment'
  - 'Her'
---

<h3>
<b>On My Way To You...&nbsp;</b></h3>
<b><i>July 1, 2019 - July 1, 2020</i></b><br />
<h4>
Dates</h4>
<br />
<ul>
<li>Aylish Eaton (Safe Date)(Zoosk) | Sunday 06/02/2019 | Spokane Comedy Club\</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>M (Tinder) - | Sunday 06/16/2019 | <i>Cancelled / Changed Mind</i></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Lana Whitley (Whisper) | Sunday 07/07/2019 |&nbsp;<i>Cancelled / Wor</i><i>k</i></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Jennifer Pascua (Elevation App) | Wednesday 07/10/2019 | Hair Appointment <i>(the excuse to meet her, wouldn't agree to a time)</i></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Jessica Wavra (Spokane Single Parents) | Sunday 07/14/2019 |&nbsp;<i>Cancelled / Work</i></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Jennifer Marrow (Northwest Singles) | Sunday 07/28/2019 | No-Li Brewhouse&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Theresa Johnson (Safe Date)(Bumble) | Sunday 08/04/2019 | First Date the Play</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Rebecca Prince (Coworker) | Sunday 08/10/2019 | Walk in the Garden</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Melissa Jordan (Bumble/Northwest Singles) | Sunday 08/11/2019 | SuperOne Uno &amp; Coffee&nbsp;<i>Cancelled / Work</i></li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
